title: Get a letter from an organisation providing domestic abuse support services
body: "To get a copy of a letter from an organisation confirming provision of domestic abuse support services, you should:   ask the domestic abuse support service to complete the form as much as possible   You can use this as evidence if you’re applying for legal aid to help you divorce or separate from an abusive partner.  If you’re part of an organisation providing domestic abuse support services, you can adapt this sample letter to confirm:   your organisation is situated in England and Wales your organisation has been in operation for 6 months or more the applicant is a victim of domestic abuser the support you have provided to the applicant   You need to give this evidence when victims of domestic abuse apply for legal aid. "
